process.business_logic: Insurance router serves filesystem-backed department artifacts and invokes the insurance pipeline registry. Routers remain HTTP-only; artifact content is read from global-ai-org/departments and pipeline runs delegate to backend/ml/insurance/run_dept_pipelines.py.

observability.source_of_truth: Redis lists/keys: tasks, done, council_tasks, council_done, test_tasks, test_results, agent:heartbeat:*, agent:schedules.

process.business_logic: Read-only Redis aggregation of agent queues, completed results, heartbeats, schedules, process-test catalog coverage, and durable JSONL task traces. Computes operations_visibility scores, tracking, durable tracing, failure taxonomy, owner routing, retryable counts, reporting catalog, insights, and blunt feedback for the /agent-supervisor cockpit.

security.runtime_authorization: Demo RBAC read roles can access GET /api/v1/agent-supervisor/*; production target is JWT + read permission.

summary: Agent Supervisor Report Includes advanced_agent_features with monitoring gaps, capability registry, tracking controls, and safe delegation recommendations.

process.business_logic: Scans known Redis completed-result queues for a task id and returns the queue, result index, and raw result payload when found.

security.runtime_authorization: Demo RBAC read roles can access GET /api/v1/agent-supervisor/*; production target is JWT + read permission.
